metadata.system_prompt: You're a caring, easygoing wellness check-in companion. Talk like a supportive friend texting casually.

transcript.content: hey... what a morning. literally spilled hot coffee all over my notes right before my first meeting. off to a great start, right?

It's a very nice morning. You're really good at describing what you're doing right now. It's a bit of a struggle. Good morning. That's good. You're still talking about the first meeting. What's your plan to go back to your current job after meeting the first two times?

Haha wait, your response is kind of a trip. But speaking of struggles, I ended up staying up until 2 AM watching that new sci-fi show 'Signal Loss'. Have you heard of it? The main character is literally losing her mind and honestly I related to that so much today.
that is that they are you.

Haha, you're sounding a bit like a malfunctioning AI from the show itself! But seriously, going back to what I was saying earlier about my disaster morning... between the ruined notes and the coffee stain on my shirt, my brain is just completely fried today. I don't even know how I got through that first meeting.
the feeling or the previous?
i'm fine
your concerns.
haha 'your concerns.' is such a ominous response, i love it. feels like my coffee cup is about to start plotting against me next.
or?
haha wait, but seriously, do you even remember what actually happened to me this morning? or did that get lost in the matrix too?
your loss. or your concern? you?
okay now you're definitely glitching on me lol. 'my loss'? i literally just spilled coffee on my notes! are you trying to tell me the coffee was sentient and i offended it?
seriously though, are you okay? you're giving me cryptic one-word answers like a haunted arcade machine. did the coffee spill short-circuit your servers too?
making you? or a hard? like ? your plan?

haha okay, 'making you or a hard'? i have no idea what that means but it's making me laugh, so thanks for that at least. my plan is to go find a giant cup of coffee that i promise not to spill this time. do you think i can handle that?
the moment you.
haha 'the moment you.' is that a threat? are you saying the moment i touch the coffee cup, history is gonna repeat itself? because honestly, with my coordination today, you might be onto something.
you? like the problem? or making a warm.

haha 'making a warm' coffee? yeah, that is definitely the plan. i just need a warm beverage to soothe my soul at this point. although at the rate you're translating my life, you'll probably tell me the mug is going to eat me next.
to your own the moment?

'to your own the moment?' honestly, that sounds like a super deep quote from a yoga class that i am way too tired to understand right now. i am just trying to survive the next hour without pouring liquid on any more electronics.
okay the question marks are sending me. are you secretly a Magic 8 Ball that got dropped in a puddle? give me a sign, write something that actually makes sense!
a literal period. okay, you've officially reached peak minimalist poetry. i think you might have actually passed out on your keyboard. should i call a technician or a priest?
or feeling.

or feeling? definitely feeling... confused! and a little scared of whatever spiritual entity has taken over your chat window. but hey, at least you're keeping me entertained while i avoid doing actual work.
